name: chr2_2q13_NPHP1_LCR
description: 2q13 NPHP1 low-copy repeat cluster: ~290 kb inverted/direct LCRs flanking the NPHP1 gene that mediate the recurrent ~290 kb NPHP1 deletion responsible for the majority of juvenile nephronophthisis type 1 cases. This is the canonical cilia-gene-cluster NAHR locus.

architecture.internal_structure: Pair of ~45 kb LCRs at ~99% identity in direct orientation flanking NPHP1; additional inverted copies create an X-pattern enabling both recurrent deletion and inversion events.
